titleStmt.title: SII 40.210: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 210. (A.R. No. B. 23 of 1933.) Hanumantapuram, Chingalput Taluk, Chingalput District, Tamil Nadu.

summary.p: On a stone lying near the Kēśava-Perumāḷ temple.
This is dated Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Jyēshṭha, śu. • ., Thursday.

Records the gift of money (50 rūkas) for celebrating the tōmpu-tirumāḷ (garden festival) of the god Chennakēśavanātha of Hanumantapuram by a certain Tōṇṭapalli Gaṅga. It states that the interest on the 50 rūkas would be 5 rūkas which are to be utilied for the celebration.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1472 Agunēṁṭi sādhāraṇa saṁvatsara jyēṣṭha śu
guruvārānanu hanumaṁtapuraṁ cennakēśavanāta
rabaṁḍārānakunu tōṁpu tirunāḷa mahōtsa
vānakunu tōṁṭapalli gaṁgaṁḍu Iccinar 50 I
yāṁbhai rūkalakunu vaḍḍi Aidurūkalu yettiti
pu tiruṇōḷa mahōtsavaṁ sāgiṁpagalavāru
grāmavāru I tōṁpu tiruṇa mahōtsavaṁ cennākēśa
vanātaṁde sākṣigānu Ācaṁdrārkaṁgānu naḍa
paṁgalavāru I tōṁpu tiruṇōḷaku vigha
taṁ Āḍevāru gaṁgakaṁtagōvunu jaṁpina pāpā
na pōvuvāru mātṛgamanaṁ cesina pāpāna bo
vuvāru tōṁṭapalli reḍḍi koḍku gaṁgaḍu śeśi
na toṁpu tiruṇōḷa mahōtsavaṁ sāgiṁpa
galavāru Iṁduku sākṣulu hariha
rādulu sūryacaṁdrulu gaṁgaḍu ce
nnakēśavarāyani sadāsēva śrī śrī
yallama cennakēśavanātani sadāsēva
palli
Digital edition of SII 40.210 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
